title.ko: 차량의 창, 방풍 유리, 비고정식의 지붕, 문 또는 동류의 장치； 차량에 특별히 적합하게 분리가능한 외부 보호 커버 (이러한 잠금쇠, 매다는 도구, 폐쇄도구, 개방도구 E05)
title.en: WINDOWS, WINDSCREENS, NON-FIXED ROOFS, DOORS, OR SIMILAR DEVICES FOR VEHICLES; REMOVABLE EXTERNAL PROTECTIVE COVERINGS SPECIALLY ADAPTED FOR VEHICLES (fastening, suspending, closing, or opening of such devices E05)

definition.ko: (1) 일반적으로 이용되는, 차량의 창, 방풍 유리, 비고정식의 지붕, 문, 또는 동류의 장치가 차량에 대해 특정하게 기재 혹은 청구하고 있으면 서브클래스 E06B에도 분류한다. (2) 클래스 B60의 타이틀에 계속되는 주에 주의할 것

title.ko: 창, 바람막이 유리 이들의 부속장치(B60J 10/00이 우선; 창으로 대신하는 공기커튼 B60J 9/04)
title.en: Windows; Windscreens; Accessories therefor (B60J0010000000 takes precedence;air curtains instead of windows B60J0009040000)
arranged at the vehicle front
adjustable
comprising more than one pane
arranged at vehicle sides
fixedly mounted
adjustable
with pivotal or rotary movement
slidable
vertically
arranged at the vehicle rear

title.ko: 부속 장치, 예. 도풍판, 블라인드(방현구B60J 3/00； 지붕 개구부에 관련하는 도풍판 B60J 7/22； 창 또는 방풍 유리용 분리 가능한 외부 보호 커버 B60J 11/08； 투명 부분 또는 반사경에 특히 적합한 난방 장치 H05B3/84)
title.en: Accessories, e.g. wind deflectors, blinds (antiglare provisions B60J0003000000;wind deflectors associated with roof openings B60J0007220000;removable external protective coverings for windows or windscreens B60J0011080000;heating arrangements specially adapted for transparent or reflecting areas H05B0003840000)

title.ko: 창 또는 바람막이 유리에 관련하는 차양구(차량용의 광학적 시각장치 B60R 1/00); 차량용 햇빛차양(개인용품을 저장 걸어놓을 수 있는 용기를 포함하는 바이저 B60R 7/05)
title.en: Antiglare equipment associated with windows or windscreens (optical viewing arrangements for vehicles B60R0001000000); Sun visors for vehicles (sun visors having appliances for stowing or holding personal property B60R0007050000)
adjustable in position
adjustable in transparency
using polarising effect

title.ko: 문(B60J 10/00이 우선, 창의 모양 B60J 1/00)
title.en: Doors (B60J0010000000 takes precedence;window aspects B60J0001000000)
arranged at the vehicle front
arranged at the vehicle sides
slidable; foldable
of roller-blind type

title.ko: 차량 후부에 배치한 것(5/04가 우선)
title.en: arranged at the vehicle rear (B60J0005040000 takes precedence)
slidable; foldable
of roller-blind type

title.ko: 비고정식의 지붕; 가동판넬 (panels) 이 있는 지붕(10/00이 우선; 창의 모양 1/00; 고정된 지붕 B62D 25/06; 윙(wings) E05F 11/00, 15/00)
title.en: Non-fixed roofs; Roofs with movable panels (B60J0010000000 takes precedence;window aspects B60J0001000000;fixed roofs B62D0025060000;mechanisms for operating wings E05F0011000000, E05F0015000000)

title.ko: 접동형식의 것
title.en: of sliding type

title.ko: 고정식의 판상부재 또는 부재구조를 갖는 것
title.en: with rigid plate-like element or elements

title.ko: 선루프(sun roofs) (7/047에서 7/053이 우선)
title.en: Sunroofs (B60J0007047000-B60J0007053000 take precedence)
movable to overlapping or nested relationship
pivoting upwardly to vent mode and moving downward before sliding to fully open mode
sliding with final closing motion having vertical component to attain closed and sealed condition

title.ko: 구동 또는 작동장치(7/047에서 7/053이 우선)
title.en: Driving or actuating arrangements (B60J0007047000-B60J0007053000 take precedence)
with non-rigid element or elements

title.ko: 비접동형식의 것, 즉 가동 또는 취급이 자재한 지붕 또는 판넬, 예 용이하게 취급할 수 있거나 또는 굴곡이 가능하고 또는 비작동 위치에 취급할 수 있는 랫 다운 톱(let-down tops) 또는 지붕
title.en: of non-sliding type, i.e. movable or removable roofs or panels, e.g. let-down tops or roofs capable of being easily detached or of assuming a collapsed or inoperative position

title.ko: 쉽게 분리할 수 있는 것, 예. 상면포, 방수포에 사용하는 프레임 또는 타포린(tarpaulins)용 고정구(타포린에 의한 차량적하의 피복 B60P 7/04)
title.en: readily detachable, e.g. tarpaulins with frames, or fastenings for tarpaulins (covering of loads on vehicles by tarpaulins B60P0007040000)
Removable panels, e.g. sunroofs

title.ko: 접어 겹칠 수 있는 것, 그 신장기구, 예 지주(7/10이 우선)
title.en: foldable; Tensioning mechanisms therefor, e.g. struts (B60J0007100000 takes precedence)
with a plurality of plate-like elements

title.ko: 접을 수 없는 것(7/10이 우선)
title.en: non-foldable (B60J0007100000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 잠금 배치(일반적인 자물쇠 E05B)
title.en: Locking arrangements (locks in general E05B)
for rigid panels
Vehicle storage compartments for roof parts
Wind deflectors for open roofs

title.ko: 메인 그룹 1/00으로부터 7/00의 하나로 분류되지 않는 장치(10/00이 우선)
title.en: Devices not provided for in one of main groups B60J0001000000-B60J0007000000 (B60J0010000000 takes precedence)
Entrance or exit closures other than windows, doors, or in roofs, e.g. emergency escape closures in vehicle bottom

title.ko: 공기 커튼(일반 F24F)
title.en: Air curtains (in general F24F)

title.ko: 밀봉 장치
title.en: Sealing arrangements
characterised by the material
consisting of two or more plastic materials having different physical or chemical properties (B60J0010170000 takes precedence)
provided with a low-friction material on the surface
provided with reinforcements or inserts

title.ko: 형태에 특징이 있는 것
title.en: characterised by the shape
having corner parts or bends
having varying cross-section in the longitudinal direction

title.ko: 둘 이상의 부품으로 구성된 것 (B60J 10/21이 우선 )
title.en: assembled from two or more parts (B60J0010210000 takes precedence)
the parts being joined along their longitudinal direction
having tubular parts
with vent holes
inflatable or deflatable
having projections, e.g. ribs, within the tubular parts
having two or more tubular cavities, e.g. formed by partition walls
characterised by water drainage means
characterised by the surface shape
the surface being primarily decorative

title.ko: 길이 방향으로 돌기, 홈 또는 통로를 가지는 것 (따로 삽입된 고정 수단, 예. 비즈(beads) 또는 가는 줄, B60J 10/36 )
title.en: having projections, grooves or channels in the longitudinal direction (for separately inserted fastening means, e.g. beads or strips, B60J0010360000)
for enclosing or housing devices for purposes other than sealing, e.g. cables
for facilitating specific deformation of sealing parts, e.g. for ensuring proper folding
characterised by the fastening means
using integral U-shaped retainers
characterised by the configuration of the retaining lips
using adhesives
using adhesive tapes, e.g. double-sided tapes
using separately inserted fastening means, e.g. using clips, beads or strips
using magnetic means
characterised by contact between two or more cooperating sealing arrangements
characterised by means for prevention or reduction of noise, e.g. of rattling or vibration of windows
characterised by defrosting arrangements
specially adapted for windows or windscreens
with integral wind-deflecting means, e.g. for preventing soiling
for sliding window panes, e.g. sash guides
for sealing the lower part of the panes
for window sashes; for glass run channels
for preventing outward displacement of windows when at high speed
for reducing air resistance due to the panes not being flush with the sash guide or glass run channel
for sashless windows, i.e. for frameless windows forming a seal directly with the vehicle body
for preventing outward displacement of windows when at high speed
the sealing arrangement being between the edges of adjacent panes
adjacent to corner pieces, mirror supports or quarter windows
for flush-glass windows, i.e. for windows flush with the vehicle body or the window frame

title.ko: 열리는 판넬, 예. 문,에 특히 적합한 것 (고정되지 않은 지붕 B60J 10/90 )
title.en: specially adapted for opening panels, e.g. doors (for non-fixed roofs B60J0010900000)
for movable panels in roofs
arranged on the vehicle body
arranged on the opening panel
mounted on, or integral with, the glass-run seals
specially adapted for non-fixed roofs, e.g. foldable roofs or removable hard-tops

title.ko: 차량에 특별히 적합하게 구성된 분리 가능한 외부 보호 커버, 예.주차용 커버(차량상부 화물 커버 B60P7/00； 차체의 마무리, 표지, 장식을 위한 위험 방지 B60R13/04； 차고로서 사용되는 텐트 E04H15/00)
title.en: Removable external protective coverings specially adapted for vehicles or parts of vehicles, e.g. parking covers (covering of load on vehicles B60P0007000000;guard strips for body finishing, identifying or decorating B60R0013040000;tents for use as garages E04H0015000000)

definition.ko: 그룹 B60J11/02 ~ B60J11/06에서, 최초개소 우선규칙이 적용됩니다. 즉. 각 계층 레벨에서 반대의 표시가 없는 경우, 첫번째 적절한 개소에 분류됩니다.

title.en: Covers wound on rollers
for covering at least the roof of the vehicle, e.g. for covering the whole vehicle

title.ko: 차량의 특정 부분만을 가리기 위한 것, 예. 도어용의 것(견인 연결기； 힛치； 견인 장치； 토잉 장치용 커버 또는 가이드 B60D1 /60； 휠, 라지에이타 또는 범퍼용 가이드 B60R19/00)
title.en: for covering only specific parts of the vehicle, e.g. for doors (covers or guards for traction couplings, hitches, draw-gear or towing devices B60D0001600000;guards for wheels, radiators or bumpers B60R0019000000)

title.ko: 창 또는 방풍 유리용의 것(방현구3/00)
title.en: for windows or windscreens (antiglare equipment B60J0003000000)

title.ko: 차바퀴용의 것(허브 캡 또는 거기에 유사한 것 B60B7/00； 예비 타이어 수용도구, 지지도구, 설치 장치 B62D43/02)
title.en: for wheels (hub caps or the like B60B0007000000;external spare wheel stowing, holding or mounting arrangements B62D0043020000)
